paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the stock has decreased by 36.32%.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline discussing the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K form filed on July 15, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form filed on July 13, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
